name: Apparatus Cursor Wake
pitch: Images in a structured grid. Moving your cursor leaves a trailing wake of scale, opacity, and saturation that slowly decays over time, tracing exploration history.

lifecycle.idle: Images rest in a dim, desaturated, and slightly compressed state.
lifecycle.discovery: Pointer enters the grid, activating distance calculations for nearby images.
lifecycle.buildUp: Rapid pointer movement leaves a vivid, high-saturation, full-scale wake trail.
lifecycle.peak: Active elements under the cursor reach full prominence, maximum opacity, and rich saturation.
lifecycle.recovery: Viscosity decay functions slowly fade visited elements back to the dim base state over time.
